params.description:
On Aug 11, 1504, Italian sculptor Michelangelo created this famous stone sculpture. This sculpture depicts a nude young man, full of muscles and vitality in an asymmetrical stance. It embodies Renaissance humanism and symbolizes that societies have freed themselves from the shackles of the Dark Ages and have come to realize their ability to transform the world. [Basic Info] Type: Relief Art
Collected by: Florence Academy of Fine Arts, Italy
Height: 3.96m
Base: 5.5m
Material: Marbl …
